data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Service-oriented architecture with microservices allows independent deployment and scalability.

data.title: Distributed Database Systems
data.description: Utilizes distributed databases to handle massive amounts of data across various locations.

data.title: Global CDN Integration
data.description: Content delivery network to distribute static and dynamic content to end users.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Automatically distributes incoming application traffic across multiple targets.

data.title: Auto-Scaling
data.description: Automatically adjusts the number of active servers in response to the load.
